name: riostack-vscode-ext
description: Front Matter-first Astro workspace for a RioStack VS Code Insiders workbench baseline.

scripts.setup:extensions:insiders: code-insiders --install-extension eliostruyf.vscode-front-matter && code-insiders --install-extension bretwardjames.gh-projects && code-insiders --install-extension astro-build.astro-vscode
scripts.setup:extensions:stable: code --install-extension eliostruyf.vscode-front-matter && code --install-extension bretwardjames.gh-projects && code --install-extension astro-build.astro-vscode
